name: Crab & Cheese Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup finely chopped green bell pepper
1/4 cup French dressing or cocktail sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. If using frozen crabmeat, drain about half the liquid from the package.
2. In a large bowl, combine the thawed crab, chopped onion, celery, and green bell pepper with the hard-boiled eggs.
3. Add the shredded Swiss cheese and mix well.
4. Stir in the mayonnaise and French dressing or cocktail sauce until evenly distributed.
5. Season with salt to taste.
6. Chill the salad in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.
